conditions.name: Myocardial Infarction
conditions.explanation: Chest pain with arm pain may indicate heart attack.

conditions.name: Angina
conditions.explanation: Pressure in the chest can also be angina.

data.action: Call emergency services immediately or have someone take you to the hospital.
home_tips: Do not attempt to drive yourself.
warning_signs: Chest pain lasting over 20 minutes with radiation to the arm.
data.disclaimer: This is AI information only, not medical advice. For emergencies call 115.
